case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. IVAN DAVID RAMIREZ GARCIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2020 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2020 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY LUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTION SPEICALIST. DEFENDANT IVAN DAVID RAMIREZ GARCIA IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,758.79 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, IVAN DAVID RAMIREZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED DEC-16-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, IVAN DAVID RAMIREZ
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 01/08/20. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, IVAN DAVID RAMIREZ $1,758.79 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,858.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
JUDGMENT ASSIGNED BY JUDGMENT CREDITOR OPORTUN, INC. ASSIGNED TO JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY FILED BY ASSIGNEE JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, IVAN DAVID RAMIREZ
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $770.94 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, IVAN DAVID RAMIREZ
